keyword_groups.label: schizophrenia / psychosis nursing
keyword_groups.pubmed_query: ("Schizophrenia"[MeSH] OR "Psychotic Disorders"[MeSH]) AND ("Psychiatric Nursing"[MeSH] OR nurs*[tiab])

keyword_groups.label: borderline personality disorder
keyword_groups.pubmed_query: "Borderline Personality Disorder"[MeSH] AND (nurs*[tiab] OR "Psychiatric Nursing"[MeSH])

keyword_groups.pubmed_query: "Bipolar Disorder"[MeSH] AND (nurs*[tiab] OR "Psychiatric Nursing"[MeSH])

keyword_groups.pubmed_query: "Depressive Disorder, Major"[MeSH] AND (nurs*[tiab] OR "Psychiatric Nursing"[MeSH])

keyword_groups.pubmed_query: "Anxiety Disorders"[MeSH] AND (nurs*[tiab] OR "Psychiatric Nursing"[MeSH])

keyword_groups.pubmed_query: "Obsessive-Compulsive Disorder"[MeSH] AND (nurs*[tiab] OR "Psychiatric Nursing"[MeSH])

keyword_groups.pubmed_query: "Stress Disorders, Post-Traumatic"[MeSH] AND (nurs*[tiab] OR "Psychiatric Nursing"[MeSH])

keyword_groups.pubmed_query: "Substance-Related Disorders"[MeSH] AND (nurs*[tiab] OR "Psychiatric Nursing"[MeSH])

keyword_groups.label: dual diagnosis / comorbidity nursing
keyword_groups.pubmed_query: (dual diagnosis[tiab] OR comorbidity[tiab] OR "co-occurring disorders"[tiab]) AND (nurs*[tiab] OR "Psychiatric Nursing"[MeSH])

keyword_groups.label: dementia psychiatric nursing
keyword_groups.pubmed_query: ("Dementia"[MeSH] OR "Alzheimer Disease"[MeSH]) AND ("Psychiatric Nursing"[MeSH] OR psychiatric nurs*[tiab])

keyword_groups.label: ADHD nursing
keyword_groups.pubmed_query: "Attention Deficit Disorder with Hyperactivity"[MeSH] AND (nurs*[tiab] OR "Psychiatric Nursing"[MeSH])

keyword_groups.pubmed_query: "Autism Spectrum Disorder"[MeSH] AND (nurs*[tiab] OR "Psychiatric Nursing"[MeSH])

keyword_groups.pubmed_query: "Personality Disorders"[MeSH] AND (nurs*[tiab] OR "Psychiatric Nursing"[MeSH])

keyword_groups.label: dialectical behavior therapy
keyword_groups.pubmed_query: "Dialectical Behavior Therapy"[MeSH] OR (dialectical behavior therap*[tiab] AND (nurs*[tiab] OR psychiatr*[tiab]))

keyword_groups.label: trauma-informed care nursing
keyword_groups.pubmed_query: ("Trauma-Informed Care"[MeSH] OR trauma-informed care[tiab] OR trauma-informed nursing[tiab]) AND (nurs*[tiab] OR psychiatr*[tiab])

keyword_groups.label: therapeutic relationship / communication
keyword_groups.pubmed_query: ("Nurse-Patient Relations"[MeSH] OR therapeutic relationship[tiab] OR therapeutic communication[tiab] OR nurse-patient relationship[tiab]) AND (psychiatr*[tiab] OR "Psychiatric Nursing"[MeSH])

keyword_groups.label: psychoeducation nursing
keyword_groups.pubmed_query: (psychoeducation[tiab] OR "patient education"[tiab]) AND (nurs*[tiab] OR "Psychiatric Nursing"[MeSH])

keyword_groups.label: recovery-oriented care nursing
keyword_groups.pubmed_query: (recovery-oriented[tiab] OR "recovery approach"[tiab] OR "strengths-based"[tiab]) AND (nurs*[tiab] OR "Psychiatric Nursing"[MeSH])

keyword_groups.label: de-escalation / aggression management psychiatric
keyword_groups.pubmed_query: (de-escalation[tiab] OR "aggression management"[tiab] OR "violence prevention"[tiab]) AND (nurs*[tiab] OR psychiatr*[tiab])

keyword_groups.label: family interventions psychiatric nursing
keyword_groups.pubmed_query: ("Family Therapy"[MeSH] OR family intervention*[tiab] OR carer support[tiab]) AND (nurs*[tiab] OR "Psychiatric Nursing"[MeSH])

keyword_groups.label: early intervention psychosis nursing
keyword_groups.pubmed_query: (early intervention[tiab] AND psychos*[tiab] OR first-episode psychosis[tiab]) AND (nurs*[tiab] OR "Psychiatric Nursing"[MeSH])

keyword_groups.label: safewards / milieu therapy
keyword_groups.pubmed_query: (safewards[tiab] OR "milieu therapy"[tiab] OR "therapeutic milieu"[tiab] OR "ward atmosphere"[tiab]) AND (nurs*[tiab] OR psychiatr*[tiab])

keyword_groups.label: open dialogue psychiatric nursing
keyword_groups.pubmed_query: "open dialogue"[tiab] AND (nurs*[tiab] OR psychiatr*[tiab])

keyword_groups.label: motivational interviewing psychiatric nursing
keyword_groups.pubmed_query: "Motivational Interviewing"[MeSH] AND (psychiatr*[tiab] OR nurs*[tiab])

keyword_groups.label: mindfulness psychiatric nursing
keyword_groups.pubmed_query: (mindfulness[tiab] OR "mindfulness-based"[tiab]) AND psychiatr*[tiab] AND nurs*[tiab]

keyword_groups.label: inpatient psychiatric nursing
keyword_groups.pubmed_query: ("Psychiatric Department, Hospital"[MeSH] OR inpatient psychiatr*[tiab] OR acute psychiatric ward[tiab]) AND nurs*[tiab]

keyword_groups.label: community mental health nursing
keyword_groups.pubmed_query: "Community Mental Health Services"[MeSH] AND nurs*[tiab]

keyword_groups.label: home treatment / crisis resolution nursing
keyword_groups.pubmed_query: (home treatment[tiab] OR crisis resolution[tiab] OR "assertive community treatment"[tiab]) AND (mental health[tiab] OR psychiatr*[tiab]) AND nurs*[tiab]

keyword_groups.label: child adolescent psychiatric nursing
keyword_groups.pubmed_query: ("Child Psychiatry"[MeSH] OR "Adolescent Psychiatry"[MeSH] OR child and adolescent mental health[tiab]) AND nurs*[tiab]

keyword_groups.label: geriatric psychiatric nursing
keyword_groups.pubmed_query: ("Geriatric Psychiatry"[MeSH] OR old age psychiatry[tiab] OR psychogeriatric*[tiab]) AND nurs*[tiab]

keyword_groups.label: perinatal mental health nursing
keyword_groups.pubmed_query: (perinatal mental health[tiab] OR postpartum psychiatr*[tiab] OR maternal mental health[tiab]) AND nurs*[tiab]

keyword_groups.label: transcultural / refugee mental health nursing
keyword_groups.pubmed_query: (transcultural[tiab] OR refugee*[tiab] OR migrant*[tiab] OR "cultural competence"[tiab]) AND mental health[tiab] AND nurs*[tiab]

keyword_groups.label: intellectual disability psychiatric nursing
keyword_groups.pubmed_query: "Intellectual Disability"[MeSH] AND (psychiatr*[tiab] OR mental health[tiab]) AND nurs*[tiab]

keyword_groups.label: evidence-based psychiatric nursing
keyword_groups.pubmed_query: (evidence-based[tiab] OR "evidence based"[tiab]) AND "Psychiatric Nursing"[MeSH]

keyword_groups.label: nursing theory / models psychiatry
keyword_groups.pubmed_query: (nursing theory[tiab] OR nursing model*[tiab] OR "tidal model"[tiab] OR nursing conceptual framework[tiab]) AND (psychiatr*[tiab] OR mental health[tiab])

keyword_groups.label: forensic psychiatric nursing
keyword_groups.pubmed_query: "Forensic Psychiatry"[MeSH] AND (nurs*[tiab] OR "Psychiatric Nursing"[MeSH])

keyword_groups.label: coercion / seclusion / restraint nursing
keyword_groups.pubmed_query: ("Restraint, Physical"[MeSH] OR seclusion[tiab] OR coercion[tiab] OR "mechanical restraint"[tiab]) AND (nurs*[tiab] OR psychiatr*[tiab])

keyword_groups.label: involuntary treatment / mental health law
keyword_groups.pubmed_query: (involuntary[tiab] AND (treatment[tiab] OR hospitalization[tiab])) AND (psychiatr*[tiab] OR nurs*[tiab] OR mental health[tiab])

keyword_groups.label: autonomy / ethics psychiatric nursing
keyword_groups.pubmed_query: (autonomy[tiab] OR "informed consent"[tiab] OR ethics[tiab] OR "human rights"[tiab]) AND "Psychiatric Nursing"[MeSH]

keyword_groups.label: psychiatric nursing burnout / compassion fatigue
keyword_groups.pubmed_query: (burnout[tiab] OR "compassion fatigue"[tiab] OR "secondary traumatic stress"[tiab]) AND ("Psychiatric Nursing"[MeSH] OR psychiatric nurs*[tiab])

keyword_groups.label: psychiatric nurse supervision / wellbeing
keyword_groups.pubmed_query: (supervision[tiab] OR wellbeing[tiab] OR well-being[tiab] OR "reflective practice"[tiab]) AND ("Psychiatric Nursing"[MeSH] OR psychiatric nurs*[tiab])

keyword_groups.label: psychiatric nursing education / training
keyword_groups.pubmed_query: ("Education, Nursing"[MeSH] OR nursing education[tiab] OR nursing training[tiab] OR competenc*[tiab]) AND psychiatr*[tiab]

keyword_groups.label: psychiatric nursing workforce / staffing
keyword_groups.pubmed_query: (workforce[tiab] OR staffing[tiab] OR "nurse-to-patient ratio"[tiab] OR shortage[tiab]) AND (psychiatr*[tiab] OR mental health nurs*[tiab])

keyword_groups.label: psychiatric nursing leadership / management
keyword_groups.pubmed_query: (leadership[tiab] OR management[tiab] OR "nurse manager"[tiab]) AND ("Psychiatric Nursing"[MeSH] OR psychiatric nurs*[tiab])

keyword_groups.label: moral distress / ethical stress nursing
keyword_groups.pubmed_query: ("moral distress"[tiab] OR "moral injury"[tiab] OR ethical stress[tiab]) AND nurs*[tiab]
